quoteFirst: Behind me a most musical     clock, marking now
quoteLast: On my left two great     windows looking out on the court in front of the house, through     one of which, slightly opened, comes in gushes the soft damp     breath, with a tone of spring-life in it, which the close of an     English February sometimes brings--so different from a November     mildness.
